name: Create Certificate
description: Creates a new indigene certificate request. Validates that the user has no pending requests, no pending payments, and is a Benue indigene before allowing creation.
validation: Business rule: User must not have an existing Pending certificate request
Business rule: User must not have a pending payment
Business rule: User must be a Benue indigene

errorResponses.message: You already have a pending certificate request
You have a pending payment
User is not a Benue indigene
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Update Certificate
description: Updates an existing certificate request. Only allowed if the certificate status is Pending or Rejected.
validation: Business rule: Certificate must be in Pending or Rejected status

errorResponses.message: Certificate cannot be updated in its current status
Certificate not found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Download Certificate
description: Downloads the indigene certificate as a PDF file. Enforces download limits and expiry dates.
successExample: Binary PDF data with Content-Type: application/pdf

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Download limit exceeded or download window expired
Error generating certificate PDF

name: Download Certificate (Alternate)
description: Downloads the indigene certificate as a PDF using an alternate route. Does not enforce download limits.
successExample: Binary PDF data with Content-Type: application/pdf

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Error generating certificate PDF

name: Get Certificate Details
description: Returns the public details of a certificate including the holder's name, LGA, state, and kindred.

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found

name: View Certificate
description: Returns an HTML page for viewing the certificate in the browser.

headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Template not found

name: Get All Certificate Requests
description: Returns all certificate requests sorted by most recent, with populated user and approver data. Admin only.

errorResponses.message: User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Approve Certificate
description: Approves a pending certificate request. Sets status to Approved and records the approver.
validation: id: string, required (MongoDB ObjectId, from path param)
approvedBy: string, from @Body('approvedBy'), the user ID of the approver

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Reject Certificate
description: Rejects a pending certificate request with a reason. Notifies the user via email.
validation: id: string, required (MongoDB ObjectId, from path param)
approvedBy: string, from @Body('approvedBy'), the user ID of the rejector

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Resubmit Certificate Request
description: Resubmits a rejected certificate request with updated data. Increments the resubmission attempts counter.

errorResponses.message: Certificate cannot be resubmitted
Certificate not found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Paginated Certificates
description: Returns a paginated list of all certificates.

errorResponses.message: Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Certificates By LGA
description: Returns all certificates matching the specified Local Government Area.

errorResponses.message: LGA parameter is required
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Latest Certificate
description: Returns the most recently created certificate.

errorResponses.message: No certificates found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Latest Approved Certificate
description: Returns the most recently approved certificate.

errorResponses.message: No approved certificates found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Approved Certificates (Paginated)
description: Returns paginated approved certificate requests. Support admin only.

errorResponses.message: User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Requests By Statuses
description: Returns paginated certificate requests filtered by statuses. Default statuses: Pending,Rejected.
validation: statuses: string, optional, default: 'Pending,Rejected', comma-separated list of statuses

errorResponses.message: User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Certificate By ID
description: Returns a single certificate by its MongoDB ObjectId with populated user data.

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Certificate By User ID
description: Returns a certificate by the user's ID with populated user data.

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get Requests By User ID
description: Returns all certificate requests submitted by a specific user.

errorResponses.message: No requests found for this user
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Get User Request (Admin)
description: Returns a certificate request by ID with populated data. Admin only.

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
User does not have required permission
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Delete Certificate
description: Deletes a certificate record by its ID.

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Stream PDF From URL
description: Streams a PDF document from an encoded external URL. Public access with JWT bypass.
validation: encodedUrl: string, required, must be URL-encoded
successExample: Binary PDF data with Content-Type: application/pdf

errorResponses.message: Error fetching PDF from external URL

name: Stream Document
description: Streams a document (idCard or birthCertificate) from Cloudinary for a given certificate request. Detects MIME type from URL structure.
successExample: Binary image/PDF data streamed from Cloudinary

errorResponses.message: Document '<docType>' not found for this request.
Could not determine the type of the stored document.
Could not retrieve the document. Please try again later.

name: Verify Certificate
description: Publicly verifies a certificate's authenticity using its ID and hash. Renders a verification or invalid HTML page. Rate-limited to 5 requests per minute.
successExample: HTML page rendered from templates/verification.hbs or templates/invalid.hbs

errorResponses.message: Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded (5 per minute)

name: Request Reprint
description: Initiates a reprint request for an existing certificate. Creates a payment transaction via Credo. Rate-limited to 3 requests per minute.

errorResponses.message: Reprint not allowed for this certificate
Certificate not found
Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded (3 per minute)
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Download Reprint
description: Downloads a reprint of an existing certificate as a PDF. Rate-limited to 5 requests per minute.
validation: Business rule: Reprint payment must be completed
Business rule: Reprint download must not be expired
successExample: Binary PDF data with Content-Type: application/pdf

errorResponses.message: Reprint payment not completed
Reprint download window expired
Certificate not found
Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded (5 per minute)
Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token

name: Stream Certificate Inline
description: Streams the indigene certificate PDF inline (displayed in browser) rather than as a download.
successExample: Binary PDF data rendered inline in browser

errorResponses.message: Certificate not found
Error generating certificate PDF
